name: Agentuity
description: Full-stack cloud platform purpose-built for AI agents. Provides infrastructure for building, deploying, and scaling autonomous agentic software with long-running execution, stateful persistence, advanced observability, and deployment flexibility across clouds and on-premises environments.
notes: V1 launched February 2026. Purpose-built infrastructure addressing gaps in traditional cloud platforms for autonomous agents. Supports hybrid deployment (public/private cloud, on-premises, edge). Features custom orchestration layer, built-in storage services, and advanced evaluation capabilities.
